title: Slots
description: Earn new inventory slots with experience levels.
body:
This mod allow you to gain new inventory slots with experience levels.  

By default, you gain 1 slot every 3 levels (can be changed in the config).  
You can gain a maximum of 27 inventory slots.  
The earned slots are present as long as you have enough experience levels (meaning the amount of slots is reduced when your xp level is reduced).

You can also earn slots by finding slot rewards in treasure chests.  
These slots are not dependent on xp level and are not removed on death.  
Slots rewards are disabled by default.

 
You can open the earned slots inventory with a custom keybind (default is 'n').
